FunS Game

The Global Web3 Game Platform

The future value of the global Web3 platform — an ecosystem where both developers and users win.

🎮

Play-to-Earn

Exchange tokens earned through gameplay for crypto or cash on the DEX. Experience a P2E system that works as a real income source.

💎

NFT Characters

Own and upgrade unique NFT characters across fantasy, sci-fi, and casual genres. Complete digital ownership guaranteed.

🌍

Global Distribution

Developers distribute games directly to global users with minimal fees. An open ecosystem that shares revenue fairly.

🤝

Referral System

As lower-level sales grow in the global referral network, profits flow upward. Early participants earn the greatest rewards.

🎰

Roulette & Mini Games

Various in-platform game content provides additional earning opportunities. A unique ecosystem where fun and profit go hand in hand.

🔐

Web3 Security

Blockchain-based transparent transactions keep your assets secure. Realizing the principle: "Not your keys, not your coins."

Vision

FunS Platform
Vision

Building a next-gen ecosystem where anyone worldwide can become a digital economy participant for just $10.

  • 01

    Membership Revenue

    $10 Starter and $100 Pro memberships secure initial capital and drive continuous user acquisition

  • 02

    Game Revenue Share

    A share of all in-platform game revenue is fairly split between developers and the platform

  • 03

    DEX Trading Fees

    0.3–0.5% fee on all FunSwap DEX transactions — redistributed to operations and reward pools

    Avatar & NFT Economy

    Continuous revenue from avatar creation, upgrades, and NFT marketplace trading fees

Roadmap

FunS Project Roadmap

A step-by-step journey toward a global mega-platform

~ 2026.01

Preparation Phase

  • Blockchain-based system development & testing
  • Initial community building & beta service launch
🚀
🌍
2026.02

Launch Phase

  • Service launch in 10 countries
  • Global expansion & multilingual support
  • Mobile app launch & UX improvements
2026. Q3~Q4

Expansion Phase

  • FUNS Coin listing on major exchanges
  • Additional financial services & product development
  • Strategic partnership expansion with financial institutions
📈
🏆
2027 ~

Maturity Phase

  • Launch of global financial inclusion initiative
  • Blockchain-based economic education platform development
  • Introduction of decentralized governance model
Phase 5

Exchange Listing & Global Expansion

  • Major centralized exchange (CEX) listing
  • Global DEX multi-chain expansion
  • Institutional partnerships
  • FUNS ecosystem governance launch
